compiled_state.title: Update CLAUDE.md with ticket lifecycle management documentation
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Update CLAUDE.md architecture section to document:
1. ARCHIVED event type: the reducer sets state['archived']=True, ticket list excludes archived tickets, ticket show includes them
2. Batch reducer: reduce_all_tickets() with --batch and --exclude-archived CLI flags
3. Compact-on-close: ticket-transition.sh calls compact with --threshold=0 --skip-sync on close
4. ticket-lifecycle.sh: bulk compact + archive + single commit + 3-retry push
5. ticket-lifecycle.yml: GitHub Actions cron workflow
6. Quick reference table: add ticket-lifecycle.sh and ticket compact --no-commit commands

## File Impact
- Modify: CLAUDE.md

## TDD Exemption
Unit exemption criteria 1+2+3: CLAUDE.md is a documentation file with no conditional logic. Any test would be a change-detector. Infrastructure-only.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions ARCHIVED event type
  Verify: grep -q 'ARCHIVED' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions ticket-lifecycle.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket-lifecycle' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions batch reducer
  Verify: grep -q 'batch.*reduce\|reduce_all_tickets' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions compact-on-close
  Verify: grep -qi 'compact.*close\|close.*compact' CLAUDE.md
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: CLAUDE.md updated with lifecycle management documentation.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
